results.rendered_html: saṃ-vaha m. ‘bearing or carrying along’, N. of the wind of the third of the 7 Mārgas or paths of the sky (that which is above the ud-vaha and impels the moon; the other five winds being called ā-, pra-, vi-, pari-, and ni-vaha),  MBh. ;  Hariv.  &c.
